input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8718 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is caused by a version-specific API signature change in org.eclipse.sisu.space.QualifiedTypeBinder.hear, so tests must use the two-argument form for this version line.
The library is deprecated legacy wrapper code; generated tests should prefer public wrapper APIs and resolved transitive Sisu/Guice APIs rather than assuming older 1.x signatures.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; the artifact is a legacy Guice/Sisu wrapper whose core usage is classpath scanning and Guice injection using its resolved transitive dependencies.
